title: Android mobile platform crashes when uploading images to an update

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, how are everyone. We need to know from another monday users specifically on the mobile app for android. We´are having serious issues uploading many images to an update from the cellphone.
We have reached support from monday.com but its taking too long to get a fix and every process we do with our field technicians is reported this way. So with this being said we cannot continue doing our jobs normally.

This is a video on how doing this process (only happens on android platform) the android operating system crashes seriously, and you cant do anything but shut down and restart , and uninstall the app because on restart it tries to upload the files again and make everything crashes again too.

drive.google.com

ANDROID MOBILE FAILURE UPLOADING IMAGES TO AN UPDATE.mp4

Google Drive file.
